headline: Is MGM Resorts International (MGM) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is MGM a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on MGM Resorts International on TradersPro’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on MGM. MGM Resorts International’s share was trading at $49.19 as of June 26th. MGM’s trailing and forward P/E were 67.38 and 24.57 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. […]

headline: Rachel Cruze Says Sports Betting, Crypto Are Putting Young Americans' Finances At Risk
summary: Rachel Cruze warns sports betting and quick-rich schemes are hurting young adults’ long-term financial futures.

headline: Americans Bet Twice As Much On Sports Last Year As Amazon Earned, Anthony Pompliano Says: Stocks And ETFs In Focus
summary: Anthony Pompliano said Americans wagered twice as much on sports betting last year as Amazon generated in net income.

raw.headline: Americans Bet Twice As Much On Sports Last Year As Amazon Earned, Anthony Pompliano Says: Stocks And ETFs In Focus
